---
title: "Cannulated surgical instruments"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Part of the **orthopedic** group &middot; 2,111 items
:::

Cannulated surgical instruments are specialised tools that allow surgeons to thread them through body cavities, creating a clear pathway for other devices. They include a range of flexible tubes, stents and catheters used in many areas from urology to orthopaedics. This collection contains roughly about two thousand one hundred distinct items.

## Sample Products

| Product |
|---------|
| Adelante SafeSheath Ultra Lite - Peel-Away Introducer with Hemostatic Valve, 11F |
| Pacific™ Plus - CATH PCP040080090 PCP D4.00 L 80 UL 900 |
| SUB-Q - 36" Single SUB-Q set, 6mm needle and 27-gauge w/Dressing, Box of 10 |
| LoFric® Primo™ - Single Use Urinary Catheter LoFric Primo Nelaton 8" 08FR Paediatric |
| Anodyne Surgical - Anterior Chamber Cannula 27g X 3mm bend |

## Related Categories

**Most similar:**

- [Surgical instrumentation & implants](surgical-instrumentation-implants.qmd)

**In the orthopedic group:**

- [Razek Surgical Instruments](razek-surgical-instruments.qmd) (3,417 items)
- [Bone Drills & Screws](bone-drills-screws.qmd) (3,259 items)
- [Surgical instrumentation & implants](surgical-instrumentation-implants.qmd) (3,050 items)
- [Orthopedic Surgical Accessories](orthopedic-surgical-accessories.qmd) (2,996 items)
- [Surgical instruments & consumables](surgical-instruments-consumables.qmd) (2,948 items)
- [General Surgical Supplies](general-surgical-supplies.qmd) (2,931 items)
- [Spine Surgical Instruments](spine-surgical-instruments.qmd) (2,557 items)

<button class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" onclick="askChat('Cannulated surgical instruments')">
  Ask about this category
</button>
